response.justification: Aisha is a highly experienced developer with over a decade of relevant experience, strongly matching the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. Her recent work explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure, AWS, and MongoDB, and her deep roots in TDD and software craftsmanship make her an excellent fit for a senior, quality-focused role.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React at scale
Explicit, recent experience building AI agent infrastructure and tooling
Exceptional background in testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, though she has extensive Node.js experience
Java experience is somewhat dated (2016-2018), and Kotlin is not listed
Some historical focus on niche technologies like Dlang and Ember.js
